payload: Verify the new /api/wallets/{wallet_id}/score endpoint works correctly after deploy. Test with a known whale wallet and verify the score breakdown matches the stored whale_score in the database.

Add a frontend component to display the whale score breakdown (all 5 sub-scores) in the wallet detail view. The backend endpoint GET /api/wallets/{wallet_id}/score now returns all scoring data needed.

Review whether MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS=5 should be raised to 8 for better RPC outage tolerance. This was deferred in a previous cycle — revisit now that the app has been running and we may have RPC reliability data.
